# MyWall — Business Overview Brief

## What MyWall Is

MyWall is an **AI-powered, all-in-one influencer marketing platform** that connects brands, agencies, and creators within a single shared workspace. It describes itself as **"the world's first creator lifestyle app"** and **"the e-commerce of the creator economy."** Founded originally as a hyperlocal matchmaking platform in Dubai — where even top hotels reported difficulty finding the right influencers — the company identified the same creator-brand disconnect in India and expanded there. It is headquartered at **820, Golf Course Road, Sector 42, Gurugram, Haryana, India**.

---

## The Two Sides of the Platform

MyWall operates two distinct but integrated products:

| Product                 | Primary User                |
| ----------------------- | --------------------------- |
| **MyWall Brands App**   | Brands & agencies           |
| **MyWall Creators App** | Individual content creators |

Both are available on Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

---

## Products & Features

### Brand / Agency Side

- **IMS (Influencer Management System):** End-to-end campaign workflow covering brief creation, creator invites, applications, approvals, product shipping, deliverables, payouts, and real-time ROI reporting — campaign-wise and creator-wise.
- **Creator Discovery Database:** 150M+ creators (with a separately cited directory of 4.8M+ discoverable profiles) searchable via 30+ filters including niche, engagement rate, views, visual score, location, and follower count.
- **Creator Marketplace:** Brands post campaigns; verified creators apply with rates, timelines, and past work samples.
- **MyWall Genie:** Competitor collaboration tracking, top-performing content analysis, and content inspiration saving — lets brands see which creators competitors work with.
- **Brand Manager Dashboard:** Centralised hub for discovery, shortlisting, communication, and collaboration management; eliminates reliance on DMs, emails, and spreadsheets.
- **Growth Tools:** Auto DM (no profile activation restrictions), Brand Link-in-Bio, and Magic Menu.
- **QR Code Verification:** Upon campaign acceptance, creators receive a unique QR code activated at a pre-set date/time; brand managers scan it via the MyWall manager app for a green-tick identity and deliverable confirmation.
- **Security:** Audit logs, role-based access, encryption, and platform-grade security.

### Creator Side

- **Link-in-Bio Tool:** Consolidates brand partnerships, media kit, affiliate links, cross-platform links, and online store links into one shareable, customisable landing page. Supports custom usernames, themes, logos, videos, and GIFs. Free to sign up.
- **Creator Analytics Dashboard:** Tracks total views and reach across connected platforms (with timeframe filters), click rates on top-performing links, follower growth, average views/comments/likes/shares, audience demographics (region, country, city, age, gender), and past brand collaboration history. Brands can rate creators post-collaboration; ratings appear publicly as social proof.
- **Campaign Discovery Feed:** Creators browse and apply to live brand campaigns directly.
- **Personal Portfolio & Media Kit:** Custom-themed profiles with audience insights, content samples, and collaboration history — visible to brands during vetting.
- **Affiliate Store:** Creators aggregate all affiliate links under one roof on their MyWall profile.
- **Auto DM:** Growth tool with no profile activation restrictions.
- **Referral Programme:** Creators earn **25% of a referred user's monthly subscription fee** on an ongoing basis.
- **Upcoming — Influencer Campaign Live Tracking:** Real-time impressions, clicks, engagement, and conversion metrics during active campaigns.

---

## Campaign Types Supported

- **Barter collaborations** — products, services, or experiences in exchange for content (no cash)
- **Paid collaborations**
- **UGC (User-Generated Content) collaborations**
- **Product collaborations** (heavily discounted products in exchange for pre-set content deliverables)
- **Sales-based / affiliate campaigns**

---

## Who MyWall Serves

- **Brands and agencies** of any size seeking to plan, execute, and measure influencer campaigns
- **Content creators and influencers** at every tier — the platform explicitly accepts creators with as few as **1,000 followers** and positions itself as follower-count-agnostic
- Sector examples from the nuggets: hospitality (Hilton Goa Resort, Elivaas Hotel), F&B (Farzi Cafe, Chinese Wok), beauty/wellness (Looks Salon), luxury retail; named brand partners include **ITC** and **Tribo**

---

## Pricing (Creator-Side)

- **₹399/month** subscription for unlimited brand collaboration access (the "Pro plan")
- Free sign-up with basic profile and link-in-bio functionality

---

## Value Propositions & Differentiators

1. **All-in-one, single workspace** — campaign planning, creator discovery, communication, deliverable tracking, payouts, and ROI reporting without switching between tools, emails, or spreadsheets.
2. **No third-party agencies or managers** — direct creator-to-brand connections via the app.
3. **Follower-count-agnostic access** — nano and micro creators (1,000+ followers) can access the same premium campaigns as larger influencers.
4. **AI-powered matching** — smart campaign filters and AI suggestions match creators to relevant campaigns based on past collaborations, engagement metrics, niche, and location.
5. **Barter infrastructure** — structured tooling for non-cash collaborations, a growing segment (cited as 1-in-3 influencer campaigns in 2024).
6. **Mutual accountability** — two-way rating system (brands rate creators; creators rate brands) creates transparent track records on both sides.
7. **Verified ecosystem** — verified brands and verified creators with QR-code confirmation for in-person redemptions.
8. **Multiple income streams for creators** — brand collabs, affiliate store, UGC deals, discounted product partnerships, and referral income in one place.

---

## Mission & Vision

- **Mission:** Bridge the gap between creators and brands, enabling seamless collaborations that drive real impact.
- **Vision:** Be the go-to app for creators — an all-in-one platform addressing every challenge creators face.
- **Core belief:** Creators are the new game-changers of the global economy, capable of reshaping brands and industries.

---

## Recurring Terminology to Use

| Term                                   | Context                                                                     |
| -------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| All-in-one                             | Platform positioning (used consistently across brand and creator messaging) |
| Creator lifestyle app                  | MyWall's self-descriptor for the creator product                            |
| Influencer Management System / IMS     | The brand-side campaign management suite                                    |
| MyWall Genie                           | Competitor intelligence and content inspiration tool                        |
| Barter collaboration                   | Non-cash, product/service-for-content deal type                             |
| Creator Marketplace                    | The campaign listing and application hub                                    |
| Link-in-bio                            | Creator landing page / digital identity tool                                |
| Auto DM                                | Creator growth tool                                                         |
| Visual score                           | One of the 30+ creator search filters                                       |
| Campaign-wise / creator-wise reporting | ROI reporting structure                                                     |
| Nano / micro influencers               | Creators with smaller but highly engaged audiences                          |
| VIP / premium brand deals              | Aspirational language for high-value collab opportunities                   |
| E-commerce of the creator economy      | Platform metaphor used in brand narrative                                   |
